headline: As Meta Doubles Down on Data Center Investment, AMD and American Tower Could Be the Top Stocks to Buy
summary: A durable wave of hyperscale data center buildout should keep high‑end GPUs like AMD’s Instinct line and dense interconnection platforms such as American Tower’s CoreSite campuses in high demand.

raw.headline: As Meta Doubles Down on Data Center Investment, AMD and American Tower Could Be the Top Stocks to Buy
raw.summary: A durable wave of hyperscale data center buildout should keep high‑end GPUs like AMD’s Instinct line and dense interconnection platforms such as American Tower’s CoreSite campuses in high demand.

headline: Assessing American Tower (AMT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: American Tower (AMT) is back in focus after recent share price pressure, with the stock showing an 11.6% decline over the past month and a 3.6% decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for American Tower. The recent weakness in the 1 month share price return of 11.6% and the 1 year total shareholder return of 18.6% sit alongside a 3 year total shareholder return of 8.2%. This suggests momentum has been fading rather than building. If you are looking beyond towers and data...

headline: Conflict Without Closure
summary: U.S. stocks slide into correction as Iran conflict fuels volatility, energy jitters, and rising rates hit REITs.
